wiki.summary: "Eyes Without a Face" is a song about the desperation and loneliness of one person as they wander far from home, desperately trying to find solace in the lies they tell themselves. The narrator is struggling to keep up the facade, while they are slowly losing any connection they still have to the love that was once alive and new between them. The song emphasizes the emptiness and desperation, with the chorus of "(Les yeux sans visage) Eyes without a face/ Got no human grace/ You're eyes without a face". Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: "Eyes Without a Face" is a song about the desperation and loneliness of one person as they wander far from home, desperately trying to find solace in the lies they tell themselves. The narrator is struggling to keep up the facade, while they are slowly losing any connection they still have to the love that was once alive and new between them. The song emphasizes the emptiness and desperation, with the chorus of "(Les yeux sans visage) Eyes without a face/ Got no human grace/ You're eyes without a face". In the end, the narrator comes to realize that it has become too difficult to keep up the facade of the lies they have been telling themselves, and they are ultimately left with a sense of emptiness and despair. Read more on Last.fm. User-contributed text is available under the Creative Commons By-SA License; additional terms may apply.
